transcript.clean_text: and so to the queen stage of this year's of Welter destination anglu stage 17 of the great race and time running out for those who would be part of a breakaway which this day seemed to suggest would happen AO chearing the breeze ignoring questions about teamwork for now anyway L Leon Sanchez bandaged but unbowed after taking a real rough housing on the day prior and SE cus on his birthday wearing red but would he be wearing red at the end of the day this is what they had to deal with short stage compact maybe just 124.401 Temptation was too much for Mark Solair who sprang out of the peltin chasing down those who'd been in the break and we were asking questions about their strategy once again it's a mystery over the top went aapol with katano and indeed two category one tests before we got to the special climb of the angoo was too much of a Temptation for aapo in that Jersey competition his teammate katano had done a job of time tring through the valley and Away went aapo to virtually make sure mathematically that that Jersey belongs to him yo vismo were running out of resources Dylan vanal had done a big turn and then Bahrain Victorious came through to help out as aole added yet more to his points tally on the penultimate test so was starting to run out of legs as bar and Victorious were hoping to tea up ML Lander well PA's doing some spectacular work likewise brago and indeed Caruso on behalf of their team leader a pole knew that this day was not going to be his once we got to the testy ramps the angoo itself an absolute nightmare 6 and2 kilm to the finale with ramps over 23% and it had a big toll not least on UI team Emirates AO seemed to be going backwards aole was tagged and the man who' shared duties with him on stage 14 woman B sprang out of the group but it didn't last long and so it was was that Bahrain Victorious kicked into the mighty test at the end of the day Lander hoping to bring glory and pride to Spain Caruso going backwards and ultimately it would be as well Walt Poes but how long would indeed Lander hold on and what could yozma do now they were down to the three leaders of this race including seus in red well we've questioned strategies from many teams some they just had one car to play three for yo visma and this time they went for RIT or at least he did well what was the response of his teammates apart from anybody else Lander was doing a lot of work and almost helping SE cus out there utre was Brave for Bor hoping to tee up Blass off as well at the beginning of the day Kus let Mingo come through and then was on the radio was he asking for a slower Pace we think so maybe he was telling to go for it well cus slow down vingo and Rit pushed on Lander came back onto the back wheel of cus and started to think about potentially a Podium for the day Lander well as they came into the fog it was a two-up Sprint for the line no passing of rogl by vingo at this point 10 and six bonus seconds going to them but what would be the Gap to cus would vingo be in the red at the end of the day Kush sprinted on saluted at the cameras came past Lander got himself four vital bonus seconds and held onto the Jersey by a margin of just 8 seconds shiaa crossing the line as well utre had a good day out there Bahrain their plans not coming to fruition and certainly W uzo asking some more questions of his team once he got back to the coach cus said It felt a bit strange being passed by his teammates which suggested they didn't wait for him but he does still lead this race RIT getting another stage win to his name possibly making a statement RIT finger go cus the one two three on the stage not that order overall but they'll be happy as a team with that especially as they've extended their Gap overall on the chases cus then holding on to the red jersey by just 8 seconds happy birthday to him but will he lead this race after tomorrow's stage finger go just 8 seconds behind him rogl a minute and8 and then four minutes down now uzo who lost ground today with Lander moving up into Fifth and so another big day looms the Cru the Linares full coverage don't forget flag to line it's a crucial day the climbs come early so we're seeing it all three category 1 tests including twice over the final Peak it'll be an enthralling day and yet again we don't know how it'll pan out join us to find out
